English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Arthur H. Peterson papers
Peterson, Arthur H., 1910-1988.
7-1-1808
16 cubic feet. 16 cubic feet.
1920-1976 {comma separted list of material formats; end with period.} Subject files, department records, and financial records of the Office of the Treasurer. Collection material in English 3040305
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Michael Luther
Date completed:
January 23, 2006
EAD encoding:
Michael Luther January 23, 2006
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Treasurer, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Subject files, department records, and financial records of the Office of the Treasurer.
Cite As:
Arthur Peterson papers, #7-1-1808. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Cornell University -- : Administration Cornell University. Treasurer
